productName: Drops1:2 CBD Rosy Raspberry / Blackberry Trainwreck
description: An artisan sweet, tart raspberry edible made to feel special — rich flavor, soft sweetness, and a cannabis finish that stays smooth and approachable. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:2 ratio. A flavorful hybrid option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
